title: Val Vallese
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Val}}
'''Val Vallese''' is an author who edited some of the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] supplements. She is married to [[Ray Vallese]], a fellow editor.

*''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
*''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
